hypothesis: Mutating position 5 to aromatic residues (W/F/Y) will enhance SSTR2-specific interactions in ECL2/TM5 pockets, while mutating position 6 to acidic residues (E/D) will disrupt off-target SSTR3/5 electrostatics without compromising SSTR2 binding.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving selectivity (Δmargin > 0), but structural quality remains a bottleneck. The next iteration should focus on improving structural plausibility while maintaining selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: To prioritize candidates with both strong ddG and high structural quality (pLDDT > 0.7), ensuring that the designs are not only energetically favorable but also structurally plausible.
To increase the diversity and quantity of candidates, improving the chances of identifying a candidate with both strong ddG and high pLDDT.
